ab: ya:o hayza’ ’aehae’ kapa’ohhaelan Sin kalihin, siya rengreng mangowip maraS ka kakrang’an.
ch: 我有一個同學叫kalih，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named kalih, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: ’am kiSka:at ila, siya Somibae:aeh kala kapa’onhan ka kaka:at, tati:iS ’oka’ ma’ kaka:atan ka kina:at.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: monhael, monpoSal, monto:o’ saeboeh ma’ paSibae:aeh hi siya.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: ’ana nakhini, siya hayza’ ’ima ’awhay ka pinatawaw, rengreng Somibae:aeh ’okay pinobih ka kakrangi’an.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: bi:il ila saeboeh mae’iyaeh ma’ kayni’ ila paSibae:aeh hi siya ka kakrangi’an.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: hayza’ ’aehae’ hahila:, yami saeboeh rima’ manmanra:an.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: ray ra:an, kalih ’iniya ’inoSa’ ray kata’owan, siya ’okay ’araS nom tomi:iS ka zinowas.
ch: 路途中，kalih想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, kalihwanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: siya Somina’ ka kapa’onhaelan, saeboeh ma’ tiSkobae:oeh Sa’, ya:o ma’ ’okay ’araS o.
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說，我也沒有帶耶。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: kalih ’isa:a homangih ila, siya bi’i: komoSa’ ’ampowa’ moyo saeboeh kayni’ paSibae:aeh ’iyakin nom tomi:iS ka zinowas!
ch: kalih急的哭了出來。他生氣的說，為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙!
en: kalih burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: kapa’onhaelan nisiya’ mayaka:i’ hi siya, ma’ So’o nonak ’okay ’araS o, So: paSibaehen ka kakrangi’an So’o ma’ haSa’ minobih!
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: mowa:i’ ’aehae’ hahila: kiSka:at, kalih minremreme’ potngor ila ray kakiSka:atan, kalih mari’ ka Sinibae:aehan ka kakrangi’an Sipinobih saeboeh ka kapa’onhaelan.
ch: 隔天上學，kilih很早就到學校了，kalih把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, kalih arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: kalih tiSkobih ila ka kapa’onhaelan, mayaka:i’ Sa’ mowa:i’ naehan siya nonak ’am maraS ila ka kakrangi’an, ma’ ma’alo’ kapa’onhaelan Somiwa’ paSibae:aeh hi siya ka kakrang’an.
ch: kalih向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: kalih apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
